name: atlas
description: Atlas is a self-configuring multi-agent coding architect implemented entirely as Claude Code skills. 28 skills total: 11 Greek-mythology core skills (atlas-metis orchestration, atlas-hephaestus boot/discovery, atlas-ariadne architecture mapping, atlas-athena security/quality audit, atlas-argus observability/forensics, atlas-chronos recurring loops, atlas-hermes vendor connector setup, atlas-odysseus UX test swarm, atlas-nestor skill stacking, atlas-armada org deployment, atlas-olympus workspace scaffolding/recommendations) plus 17 task skills (atlas-feature, atlas-debug, atlas-doctor, atlas-validate, atlas-refactor, atlas-launch, atlas-harden, etc.). 23 agents (12 core + 11 armada department agents), 15 hooks including dispatch tripwire and completion gate. The atlas-metis method demands evidence before any done claim. atlas-olympus analyzes sessions and recommends which skills to run next. atlas-armada provides organizational deployment with branding, policies, compliance, and department-specific connectors. Integrates claude-mem and context-mode.

interface.shortDescription: Self-configuring multi-agent coding architect with 28 Claude Code skills, 23 agents, and observability-driven self-improvement.
